# VinTechAI — Vincent Gyan

> Personal brand site for Vincent Gyan: AI engineer & full-stack developer building intelligent software from Sunyani, Ghana.

## Pages
- [Home](/): hero, services overview, testimonials, CTA
- [About](/about): bio, skills, certifications
- [Services](/services): web, mobile, AI agents, automation, prompts, APIs, consulting
- [Portfolio](/portfolio): selected projects
- [Testimonials](/testimonials): client reviews
- [Blog](/blog): writing on AI, software, mobile, prompts
- [Ask Vincent AI](/ask-vincent): AI assistant about Vincent's work
- [Contact](/contact): email, WhatsApp, contact form
